---
title: "GLEAM homepage workflow showcase"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{GLEAM homepage workflow showcase}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.align = "center",
  fig.width = 9.8,
  fig.height = 6.8,
  out.width = "96%",
  dpi = 220
)

if (requireNamespace("GLEAM", quietly = TRUE)) {
  library(GLEAM)
} else if (requireNamespace("pkgload", quietly = TRUE)) {
  pkgload::load_all(".", export_all = FALSE, quiet = TRUE)
} else {
  stop("Need installed 'GLEAM' or package 'pkgload' to render this vignette.")
}

.pick_first_col <- GLEAM:::.pick_first_col
.stratified_keep <- GLEAM:::.stratified_keep
.map_geneset_to_expr <- GLEAM:::.map_geneset_to_expr
.fallback_signatures <- GLEAM:::.fallback_signatures
.make_discrete_palette <- GLEAM:::.make_discrete_palette
```

This vignette generates the canonical homepage figures used by README/pkgdown.

```{r data-prep, eval=requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE)}
library(Seurat)

ifnb_path <- system.file("extdata", "full_examples", "ifnb_seurat.rds", package = "GLEAM")
a1_path <- system.file("extdata", "full_examples", "stxBrain_anterior1_seurat.rds", package = "GLEAM")

if (ifnb_path == "") ifnb_path <- file.path("inst", "extdata", "full_examples", "ifnb_seurat.rds")
if (a1_path == "") a1_path <- file.path("inst", "extdata", "full_examples", "stxBrain_anterior1_seurat.rds")

seu <- readRDS(ifnb_path)

if (ncol(seu) > 5000) {
  keep <- .stratified_keep(
    meta = seu@meta.data,
    n_target = 5000,
    strata_candidates = c("orig.ident", "stim", "seurat_annotations", "seurat_clusters")
  )
  seu <- subset(seu, cells = keep)
}
md <- seu@meta.data
sample_col <- .pick_first_col(c("sample", "orig.ident"), colnames(md))
if (is.null(sample_col)) {
  md$sample <- "sample_1"
  sample_col <- "sample"
} else if (sample_col != "sample") {
  md$sample <- as.character(md[[sample_col]])
}

group_col <- .pick_first_col(c("stim", "group"), colnames(md))
if (is.null(group_col)) {
  md$group <- ifelse(seq_len(nrow(md)) <= nrow(md) / 2, "A", "B")
  group_col <- "group"
} else if (group_col != "group") {
  md$group <- as.character(md[[group_col]])
}

celltype_col <- .pick_first_col(c("seurat_annotations", "celltype", "seurat_clusters"), colnames(md))
if (is.null(celltype_col)) {
  md$celltype <- as.character(Idents(seu))
  celltype_col <- "celltype"
} else if (celltype_col == "seurat_clusters") {
  md$celltype <- paste0("cluster_", md$seurat_clusters)
} else if (celltype_col != "celltype") {
  md$celltype <- as.character(md[[celltype_col]])
}
if (!"pca" %in% names(seu@reductions)) {
  seu <- NormalizeData(seu)
  seu <- FindVariableFeatures(seu)
  seu <- ScaleData(seu)
  seu <- RunPCA(seu)
}
if (!"umap" %in% names(seu@reductions)) {
  seu <- FindNeighbors(seu, dims = 1:20)
  seu <- FindClusters(seu, resolution = 0.4)
  seu <- RunUMAP(seu, dims = 1:20)
}
md$pseudotime <- rank(Embeddings(seu, "pca")[, 1], ties.method = "average") / ncol(seu)
md$lineage <- as.character(md[[celltype_col]])
celltype_levels <- names(sort(table(as.character(md$celltype)), decreasing = TRUE))
group_levels <- unique(as.character(md$group))
md$celltype <- factor(as.character(md$celltype), levels = celltype_levels)
md$group <- factor(as.character(md$group), levels = group_levels)
pal_celltype <- setNames(
  get_palette("gleam_discrete", n = length(celltype_levels), continuous = FALSE),
  celltype_levels
)
pal_group <- setNames(
  get_palette("gleam_discrete", n = length(group_levels), continuous = FALSE),
  group_levels
)
seu@meta.data <- md

hallmark_gs <- NULL
for (sp in c("human", "mouse")) {
  gs_try <- try(get_geneset("hallmark", source = "builtin", species = sp), silent = TRUE)
  if (inherits(gs_try, "try-error")) next
  gs_try <- .map_geneset_to_expr(gs_try, rownames(seu), min_genes = 3)
  gs_try <- gs_try[vapply(gs_try, length, integer(1)) >= 3L]
  if (length(gs_try) > 0L) {
    hallmark_gs <- gs_try
    break
  }
}
if (is.null(hallmark_gs) || length(hallmark_gs) == 0L) {
  message("[GLEAM] No matched Hallmark signatures; using object-derived fallback signatures.")
  hallmark_gs <- .fallback_signatures(rownames(seu), max_genes = 30, min_genes = 3)
}
sc <- score_signature(
  object = seu,
  geneset = hallmark_gs,
  geneset_source = "list",
  seurat = TRUE,
  layer = "counts",
  slot = "counts",
  method = "rank",
  min_genes = 3,
  verbose = FALSE
)

sp_obj <- readRDS(a1_path)
if (requireNamespace("SeuratObject", quietly = TRUE)) {
  sp_obj <- tryCatch(SeuratObject::UpdateSeuratObject(sp_obj), error = function(e) sp_obj)
}
if (ncol(sp_obj) > 3500) {
  keep <- .stratified_keep(
    meta = sp_obj@meta.data,
    n_target = 3500,
    strata_candidates = c("orig.ident", "sample", "seurat_annotations", "seurat_clusters")
  )
  sp_obj <- subset(sp_obj, cells = keep)
}
md_sp <- sp_obj@meta.data
region_col <- .pick_first_col(c("seurat_annotations", "region", "seurat_clusters"), colnames(md_sp))
if (is.null(region_col)) {
  md_sp$region <- as.character(Idents(sp_obj))
} else if (region_col == "seurat_clusters") {
  md_sp$region <- paste0("cluster_", md_sp$seurat_clusters)
} else if (region_col != "region") {
  md_sp$region <- as.character(md_sp[[region_col]])
}
sp_obj@meta.data <- md_sp

gs_sp <- NULL
for (sp_name in c("mouse", "human")) {
  gs_try <- try(get_geneset("hallmark", source = "builtin", species = sp_name), silent = TRUE)
  if (inherits(gs_try, "try-error")) next
  gs_try <- .map_geneset_to_expr(gs_try, rownames(sp_obj), min_genes = 3)
  gs_try <- gs_try[vapply(gs_try, length, integer(1)) >= 3L]
  if (length(gs_try) > 0L) {
    gs_sp <- gs_try
    break
  }
}
if (is.null(gs_sp) || length(gs_sp) == 0L) {
  gs_sp <- .fallback_signatures(rownames(sp_obj), max_genes = 30, min_genes = 3)
}
sp <- score_signature(
  object = sp_obj,
  geneset = gs_sp,
  geneset_source = "list",
  seurat = TRUE,
  layer = "counts",
  slot = "counts",
  method = "rank",
  min_genes = 3,
  verbose = FALSE
)

ct_rank <- names(sort(table(sc$meta[[celltype_col]]), decreasing = TRUE))
ct_keep <- head(ct_rank, 8L)
keep_cells <- rownames(sc$meta)[sc$meta[[celltype_col]] %in% ct_keep]
sc_vis <- sc
sc_vis$score <- sc$score[, keep_cells, drop = FALSE]
sc_vis$meta <- sc$meta[keep_cells, , drop = FALSE]
sc_vis$meta[[celltype_col]] <- factor(as.character(sc_vis$meta[[celltype_col]]), levels = ct_keep)
sc_vis$meta[[group_col]] <- factor(as.character(sc_vis$meta[[group_col]]), levels = group_levels)
pal_celltype_vis <- setNames(
  get_palette("gleam_discrete", n = length(ct_keep), continuous = FALSE),
  ct_keep
)
top_sig <- rownames(sc_vis$score)[1]
```

```{r embedding_feature, eval=requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE), fig.width=10.0, fig.height=7.0, out.width="98%"}
plot_embedding_score(sc, pathway = top_sig, object = seu, reduction = "umap", point_size = 0.62) +
  ggplot2::labs(title = "Signature score on embedding")
```

```{r spatial_slice, eval=requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE), fig.width=11.0, fig.height=8.2, out.width="100%"}
plot_spatial_score(sp, pathway = rownames(sp$score)[1], object = sp_obj, point_size = 1.65) +
  ggplot2::labs(title = "Signature score on spatial slice")
```

```{r dotbar_compare, eval=requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE), fig.width=12.8, fig.height=7.8, out.width="100%"}
plot_dot_bar(sc_vis, by = c("group", "celltype"), pathway = top_sig) +
  ggplot2::labs(title = "Dot-bar signature comparison")
```

```{r violin_compare, eval=requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE), fig.width=11.0, fig.height=6.4, out.width="98%"}
plot_violin(sc_vis, pathway = top_sig, group = "celltype", point_size = 0.25, alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_gleam_fill(palette = pal_celltype_vis, continuous = FALSE) +
  ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1)) +
  ggplot2::labs(title = "Violin plot across major cell types")
```

```{r split_violin_compare, eval=requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE), fig.width=11.4, fig.height=6.6, out.width="99%"}
plot_split_violin(sc_vis, pathway = top_sig, x = "celltype", split.by = "group", alpha = 0.74) +
  scale_gleam_fill(palette = pal_group, continuous = FALSE) +
  ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1)) +
  ggplot2::labs(title = "Split violin by group within major cell types")
```

```{r ridge_compare, eval=requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE) && requireNamespace("ggridges", quietly = TRUE), fig.width=11.0, fig.height=6.6, out.width="98%"}
plot_ridge(sc_vis, pathway = top_sig, group = "celltype", alpha = 0.72, palette = pal_celltype_vis) +
  ggplot2::labs(title = "Ridge distribution across major cell types")
```

```{r trajectory_trend, eval=requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE), fig.width=10.0, fig.height=6.8, out.width="96%"}
pal_lineage <- .make_discrete_palette(length(unique(as.character(sc$meta$lineage))))

p_traj <- tryCatch(
  plot_pseudotime_score(
    sc,
    pathway = rownames(sc$score)[1],
    pseudotime = "pseudotime",
    lineage = "lineage",
    palette = pal_lineage
  ),
  error = function(e) {
    message("[GLEAM] trajectory_trend lineage-color fallback: ", conditionMessage(e))
    plot_pseudotime_score(
      sc,
      pathway = rownames(sc$score)[1],
      pseudotime = "pseudotime",
      lineage = NULL,
      palette = pal_lineage
    )
  }
)

p_traj + ggplot2::labs(title = "Trajectory-aware signature trend")
```
